description: Create a content slide on AI sentiment with a left sidebar and a two-column layout, featuring a stacked vertical bar chart of global survey results on the left and expert quotes on the right.

header.headline: AI's huge power is met with enthusiasm mixed with concerns – Inherent human values must stay central to current and future developments
